tasks.title: CleverTap Integration
prdPoints: Migrated SDK: Replaced heavy client-side SDK with lightweight HTTP endpoints to reduce download payload.
Profile Syncing: Automated user segment properties synchronization in real-time.
Event Tracking: Configured conversion event logging for premium subscriptions.

tasks.title: Socket on Vernacs
prdPoints: Real-time Updates: Implemented socket connections for localizations.
Performance Tuning: Reduced messaging latency on localized channels.
